# AI 4 Africa

> Connecting African schools, volunteer ambassadors, and companies to bring AI education to every classroom across Africa.

AI 4 Africa is a non-profit platform that matches schools needing AI literacy training with vetted volunteer ambassadors and corporate sponsors who fund the programs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission overview, impact stats, and how the platform works.
- [Active Projects](/proyectos): Browse schools currently seeking ambassadors and sponsors.
- [Register a School](/form/escuela): Application form for African schools to join the network.
- [Become an Ambassador](/form/embajador): Application form for AI volunteers.
